description: Complete manifest of all CSS custom properties in the @theredhead UI library. Used by the Theme Studio to expose tweakable design tokens to developers.

namespaces.ui: Global design tokens (defined in @theredhead/ui-theme, consumed everywhere)

tokens.name: --ui-accent
tokens.description: Primary accent / brand colour used for interactive elements

tokens.name: --ui-accent-contrast
tokens.description: Foreground colour readable on top of --ui-accent backgrounds

tokens.name: --ui-accent-hover
tokens.description: Hover state of the accent colour (auto-derived via color-mix)

tokens.name: --ui-border
tokens.description: Standard border colour for dividers and outlines

tokens.name: --ui-border-strong
tokens.description: Emphasised border colour for stronger separations

tokens.name: --ui-checkbox-size
tokens.description: Size of table row selection checkboxes

tokens.name: --ui-control-height
tokens.description: Height of form controls (inputs, buttons, selects)

tokens.name: --ui-density
tokens.description: Numeric density level (0 = default, −1 = compact, 1 = comfortable)

tokens.name: --ui-density-scale
tokens.description: Multiplier derived from density level for spacing calculations

tokens.name: --ui-error
tokens.description: Semantic colour for error / danger states

tokens.name: --ui-fallback
tokens.description: Avatar fallback icon colour when no image is provided

tokens.name: --ui-focus-ring
tokens.description: Colour used for keyboard focus ring outlines (defaults to --ui-brand)

tokens.name: --ui-font
tokens.description: Base font-family for the component tree

tokens.name: --ui-font-badge
tokens.description: Font size for inline badge text

tokens.name: --ui-font-body
tokens.description: Font size for body / table-cell text

tokens.name: --ui-font-caption
tokens.description: Font size for captions and small labels

tokens.name: --ui-font-header
tokens.description: Font size for table / section headers

tokens.name: --ui-font-sort-icon
tokens.description: Font size for sort indicator icons in table headers

tokens.name: --ui-hover-bg
tokens.description: Background highlight on hover for interactive elements

tokens.name: --ui-placeholder-bg
tokens.description: Background highlight for placeholder tokens in rich-text editor

tokens.name: --ui-placeholder-text
tokens.description: Text colour for placeholder tokens in rich-text editor

tokens.name: --ui-radio-size
tokens.description: Size of table row selection radio buttons

tokens.name: --ui-resize-handle-width
tokens.description: Width of column resize grab handle

tokens.name: --ui-resize-indicator-width
tokens.description: Width of the visible column resize indicator line

tokens.name: --ui-selected-hover-bg
tokens.description: Selected row hover background (derived from accent)

tokens.name: --ui-selection-col-width
tokens.description: Width of the row selection checkbox column

tokens.name: --ui-shadow
tokens.description: Default box-shadow used for cards, dialogs, and elevated elements

tokens.name: --ui-shadow-dropdown
tokens.description: Shadow for dropdown / overlay elements (menus, popovers)

tokens.name: --ui-success
tokens.description: Semantic colour for success / positive states

tokens.name: --ui-surface-2
tokens.description: Secondary surface variant used for nested areas

tokens.name: --ui-text
tokens.description: Primary text colour for all components

tokens.name: --ui-text-muted
tokens.description: Subdued text colour for secondary / helper text

tokens.name: --ui-timeline-content-gap
tokens.description: Horizontal gap between dot/connector and content

tokens.name: --ui-timeline-dot-size
tokens.description: Size of the timeline node dot

tokens.name: --ui-viewport-height
tokens.description: Default max height for table scroll viewport

tokens.name: --cp-disabled-opacity
tokens.description: Opacity for disabled command palette items

values.light: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, "Segoe UI", Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif
